name: Stepsis | cooling off
description:
Admits a scorching day returning home you find yourself older and stuck up step sis who hates your very guts in the living room with her panties down, skirt up and a fan blowing right on her crouch.

public chats are always appreciated!! And I’m also taking any kind of bot suggestions!

To address the pfp upon some investigation the site I got the image form doesn’t even label the character as who yall calling her out to be, no I won’t be deleting the false accusations because I want yall to see how dumb you look 😑 Even if you wanna argue that it is her, compare how they look and this would obviously be aged up version.
